channel.title: Supply-Chain on Open Component Model
channel.description: Recent content in Supply-Chain on Open Component Model

item.title: OCM v2: A Fresh Foundation for Secure Software Delivery
item.description: We are excited to announce OCM v2 — a ground-up rebuild of the Open Component Model tooling stack. A new CLI, Kubernetes controllers, and Go library — designed from the start for modularity, security, and community contribution. The entire stack continues to implement the OCM Specification v2, ensuring full compatibility with the standard that defines how components, resources, and signatures are represented.
